content: Backend: extend graamam_orders.py with FY token generator, richer OrderCreate model, customer upsert, totals calc, new create endpoint, edit endpoint
Backend: improve create_invoice_from_order in graamam_extras.py to use order.items when present
Frontend: create indianStates.js lib matching graamam_v2 STATES list
Frontend: rewrite CreateOrderDialog.jsx (type toggle, customer autofill, items grid, totals, notes, submit)
Frontend: rewrite DataTable.jsx orders list columns + row actions (History/Edit/Cancel/Discuss)
Frontend: add OrderHistoryModal for audit trail
Frontend: extend firestoreClient.js ordersRepository (update/cancel/history) + useOrders hook
Frontend: wire OrdersPage.jsx with edit/cancel/discuss/history + role checks
Self-check: lint backend/frontend, curl test order creation + GST/token logic, screenshot
